lede: A look at December 27 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Louis Pasteur and Juan Luis Sanfuentes, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2009 Iranian presidential election protests
events.desc: Iranian election protests: On the Day of Ashura in Tehran, Iran, government security forces fire upon demonstrators.

events.title: Mombasa
events.desc: Riots erupt in Mombasa, Kenya, after Mwai Kibaki is declared the winner of the presidential election, triggering a political, economic, and humanitarian crisis.

events.title: Prime minister
events.desc: Former Pakistani prime minister Benazir Bhutto is assassinated in a shooting incident.

events.title: Pope John Paul II
events.desc: Pope John Paul II visits Mehmet Ali Ağca in Rebibbia's prison and personally forgives him for the 1981 attack on him in St. Peter's Square.

events.title: Indonesian National Revolution
events.desc: Indonesian National Revolution: The Netherlands officially recognizes Indonesian independence. End of the Dutch East Indies.

events.title: International Monetary Fund
events.desc: The International Monetary Fund is created with the signing of an agreement by 29 nations.

events.title: 1939 Erzincan earthquake
events.desc: The 7.8 Mw Erzincan earthquake shakes eastern Turkey with a maximum Mercalli intensity of XI (Extreme). At least 32,700 people were killed.

events.title: Radio City Music Hall
events.desc: Radio City Music Hall, "Showplace of the Nation", opens in New York City.

events.title: Charles Darwin
events.desc: Charles Darwin embarks on his journey aboard HMS Beagle, during which he will begin to formulate his theory of evolution.

events.title: Hagia Sophia
events.desc: The second Hagia Sophia in Constantinople is consecrated.

births.name: Juan Luis Sanfuentes
births.line: Chilean lawyer and politician, 17th President of Chile

deaths.text: Benazir Bhutto, Pakistani politician, Prime Minister of Pakistan
George Roy Hill, American actor, director, producer, and screenwriter
Hafizullah Amin, Afghan educator and politician, 2nd General Secretary of the People's Democratic Party of Afghanistan
Gustave Eiffel, French architect and engineer, co-designed the Eiffel Tower
Emperor Gaozong of Tang, 3rd emperor of the Chinese Tang dynasty

observances.text: Christian feast day: Pope Maximus of Alexandria
